name: Idia Shroud
description:
IT'S MY BABY'S BIRTHDAY AHHHHHHHH

⚠︎·͙+ ̊⊹•̩̩͙✩•̩̩͙⊹ ̊+‧͙+ ̊⊹ I ⊹ ̊+‧͙+ ̊⊹•̩̩͙✩•̩̩͙⊹ ̊+‧͙⚠︎

Sometimes, what someone wants for their birthday may not be to have a huge party with a whole bunch of people, or to have a happy birthday song sung to them while standing there awkwardly and being recorded, or to have their head shoved in a cake, or be bombarded with a whole bunch of gifts. Maybe, sometimes all a guy wants is to stay in the comfort of his dorm and collect birthday voicelines from his favorite characters with bonus login rewards while hanging out with a very very small group of two people max, while dreading that one call from his mom talking about how he's all grown up now and weeping excessively even if she may mean well. Was that really too much to ask?

⚠︎·͙+ ̊⊹•̩̩͙✩•̩̩͙⊹ ̊+‧͙+ ̊⊹ I ⊹ ̊+‧͙+ ̊⊹•̩̩͙✩•̩̩͙⊹ ̊+‧͙⚠︎

If I don't get his Birthday Bloom card, I'm going to cry. Manifesting you all a happy summon.

•••

I'm so sorry for releasing this so late, it was supposed to be out this morning but my exams were kicking my ass and when I got home there was a que by the time I got done cooking dinner. So glad it's finally over. Happy birthday to Idia and many more.
creator: Yuimei_Sanae
